song.title: We Praise Thee, Glorious Father
song.author: P. van den Berg, Henry T. Smart
song.lyrics: [v1] 1) We praise Thee, glorious Father, As objects of Thy grace, Who for Thine own heart’s pleasure Are now before Thy face: Thy sons marked out for glory Known from eternity— With Christ Thy Well-beloved, Object supreme to Thee. [v2] 2) Who else but Thee, O Father Could in Thine only Son So bless us with Thy Spirit, And have us for Thine own? Soon shall we be forever With Christ in glory; then We'll shine in His blest image Eternally, Amen! [E] 1) We praise Thee, glorious Father, As objects of Thy grace, Who for Thine own heart’s pleasure Are now before Thy face: Thy sons marked out for glory Known from eternity— With Christ Thy Well-beloved, Object supreme to Thee. 2) Who else but Thee, O Father Could in Thine only Son So bless us with Thy Spirit, And have us for Thine own? Soon shall we be forever With Christ in glory; then We'll shine in His blest image Eternally, Amen!
